idea-plugin.name: Python Role Lens
idea-plugin.description:
Adds IDE awareness for the Role / delegation pattern in Python, where a class subclasses Role[SomeTaker] and forwards attribute access to a wrapped instance through __getattr__.

The members of the taker class — together with everything it inherits, and any nested roles — become available on the role instance for code completion, type inference, and Go to Declaration (Ctrl/Cmd+Click), without using inheritance.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0 — Initial release. Completion, type inference, and Go to Declaration for the Role / delegation pattern: the taker's members (plus everything it inherits and any nested roles) are injected onto a role declared with Role[Taker] or a role_taker_field(). A Role[T] parameterised by a bounded TypeVar resolves to its bound.
